zh.lifeSummary: 當Aage Thordssen Thott於1287年出生在丹麥時，他的父親Tord Aagesen Thott19歲，母親Mrs. Botildie Tott16歲。他和Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle至少有6個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於從1335年到1345年在瑞典馬爾莫斯，埋葬在瑞典馬爾莫斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aage Thordssen Thott于1287年出生在丹麦时，他的父亲Tord Aagesen Thott19岁，母亲Mrs. Botildie Tott16岁。他和Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle至少有6个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于从1335年到1345年在瑞典馬爾莫斯，埋葬在瑞典馬爾莫斯。

nameMeanings.name: Thott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Indian (Andhra Pradesh): Kappu (agrarian) name from Telugu thota meaning ‘grove’.

nameMeanings.name: Aage
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Old Danish Taki, originally a byname meaning ‘guarantor’ or ‘receiver’ (from taka ‘to take’).

historicEvents.title: The Hatuna Games
historicEvents.description: A conflict on September 29, 1306, between Birger, King of Sweden, and his brothers, the dukes Eric Magnusson and Valdemar Magnusson is known as The Hatuna Games. The brothers arrived to a party late in the night at King Birger's estate. The dukes captured and imprisoned Birger and his wife in Nykoping Castle's dungeon. Duke Eric then gained power over Sweden.

en.lifeSummary: When Aage Thordssen Thott was born in 1287, in Denmark, his father, Tord Aagesen Thott, was 19 and his mother, Mrs. Botildie Tott, was 16. He had at least 6 sons and 4 daughters with Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle. He died from 1335 to 1345, in Malmöhus, Sweden, and was buried in Malmöhus, Sweden.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aage Thordssen Thott est né en 1287, à Danemark, son père, Tord Aagesen Thott, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Botildie Tott, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles avec Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle. Il est décédé du 1335 au 1345, à Malmöhus, Suède, et a été enterré à Malmöhus, Suède.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aage Thordssen Thott 1287 in Dänemark geboren wurde, war sein Vater Tord Aagesen Thott 19 und seine Mutter Mrs. Botildie Tott 16. Er hatte mit Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb von 1335 bis 1345 in Malmöhus, Schweden und wurde in Malmöhus, Schweden begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aage Thordssen Thott è nato il nel 1287 nel Danimarca, il suo padre, Tord Aagesen Thott, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Botildie Tott, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie con Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle. Morì da 1335 a 1345, nel Malmöhus, Svezia, e fu sepolto a Malmöhus, Svezia.

ja.lifeSummary: Aage Thordssen Thottが1287年にデンマークで生まれた時，父Tord Aagesen Thottは19歳，母Mrs. Botildie Tottは16歳であった。彼はKirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfleとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼はから1335年まで1345年にスウェーデンマルムoハスで死去し，スウェーデンマルムoハスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Aage Thordssen Thott(이)가 1287년 덴마크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Tord Aagesen Thott(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Botildie Tott(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1335년 부터 1345년 까지 스웨덴 맬o후스에서 사망했으며 스웨덴 맬o후스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aage Thordssen Thott nasceu em 1287, em Dinamarca, seu pai, Tord Aagesen Thott, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Botildie Tott, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas com Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle. Ele faleceu de 1335 a 1345, em Malmöhus, Suécia, e foi sepultado em Malmöhus, Suécia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aage Thordssen Thott родился в 1287 г. в местности Дания, его отцу по имени Tord Aagesen Thott было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Botildie Tott, 16. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери от Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle. Он умер с 1335 по 1345 в местности малмoхус, Швеция и был похоронен в местности малмoхус, Швеция.

sm.BET 1335 AND 1345: mai le 1335 e o'o I le 1345

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aage Thordssen Thott nació en 1287, en Dinamarca, su papá, Tord Aagesen Thott, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Mrs. Botildie Tott, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas con Kirsten Kyrning af Vidskøfle. Murió desde 1335 hasta 1345, en Malmöhus, Suecia, y fue sepultado en Malmöhus, Suecia.
